mapper.select:
SELECT A.SERVER_ID AS serverId, A.AGENT_ID AS agentId, A.AGENT_NM AS agentNm, A.AGENT_PORT AS agentPort, S.SERVER_NM AS serverNm, S.SERVER_IP AS serverIp, A.ACCOUNT_CD AS accountCd, A.PASSWORD AS password, A.PATH AS path, A.DESCRIPTION AS description, A.RUN_CD AS runCd, C.DETAIL_NM AS runNm, A.USE_YN AS useYn FROM mhdb.TB_AGENT A LEFT OUTER JOIN mhdb.TB_CODE_DETAIL C ON A.RUN_CD = C.DETAIL_CD AND 'RUN_CD' = C.GROUP_CD JOIN mhdb.TB_SERVER S ON A.SERVER_ID = S.SERVER_ID WHERE 1=1
AND A.USE_YN like concat('%', #{useYn}, '%')
AND A.SERVER_ID = #{serverId}::integer
AND A.AGENT_ID = #{agentId}
ORDER BY A.AGENT_NM
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mhdb.TB_AGENT ( AGENT_NM, AGENT_PORT, SERVER_ID, ACCOUNT_CD, PASSWORD, PATH, RUN_CD, USE_YN, DESCRIPTION ) VALUES ( #{agent_nm}, #{agent_port}, #{server_id}, #{account_cd}, #{password}, #{path}, #{run_cd}, #{use_yn}, #{description} )
mapper.update: UPDATE mhdb.TB_AGENT SET AGENT_NM = #{agent_nm}, AGENT_PORT = #{agent_port}, ACCOUNT_CD = #{account_cd}, PASSWORD = #{password}, PATH = #{path}, DESCRIPTION = #{description}, RUN_CD = #{run_cd}, USE_YN = #{use_yn} WHERE 1=1 AND SERVER_ID = #{server_id} AND AGENT_ID = #{agent_id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM mhdb.TB_AGENT WHERE 1=1 AND SERVER_ID = #{serverId}::integer AND AGENT_ID = #{agentId}
